ddls:
CREATE TABLE "threads" (
  "thread_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each thread */,
  "thread_title" TEXT /* Title of the discussion thread */,
  "creation_datetime" TEXT /* Date and time when the thread was created */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the thread on the forum */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the thread belongs to */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the thread */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the thread */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the thread is relevant */,
  "is_pinned" INTEGER /* Is the thread pinned to the top */,
  "is_locked" INTEGER /* Is the thread locked for further discussion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("thread_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_threads_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_threads_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "thread_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the thread the post belongs to */,
  "post_timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time when the post was made */,
  "post_text" TEXT /* Text content of the post */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the post */,
  "is_edited" INTEGER /* Is the post edited */,
  "edit_timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time when the post was last edited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_thread_id FOREIGN KEY ("thread_id") REFERENCES threads ("thread_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., member, moderator, admin) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "reputation_score" INTEGER /* Reputation score of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiments" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment analysis */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the post analyzed */,
  "sentiment_type" TEXT /* Type of sentiment (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "score" REAL /* Score representing the strength of the sentiment */,
  "analyzer_tool" TEXT /* Tool used to analyze the sentiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiments_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "thread_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view count entry */,
  "thread_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the thread */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of views the thread has received */,
  "last_viewed" TEXT /* Date and time of the last view */,
  "view_region" TEXT /* Region where the thread was viewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_thread_views_thread_id FOREIGN KEY ("thread_id") REFERENCES threads ("thread_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_reactions" (
  "reaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reaction */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the post reacted to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who reacted */,
  "reaction_type" TEXT /* Type of reaction (e.g., like, dislike, funny) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time when the reaction was made */,
  "is_ reacted_by_author" INTEGER /* Is the reaction made by the post author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_reactions_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_reactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., post, reply, view) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time when the activity occurred */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reported post */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the report */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the report */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was made */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., pending, resolved, dismissed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "thread_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the thread predicted */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the post predicted */,
  "prediction_type" TEXT /* Type of prediction (e.g., trend, sentiment) */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Predicted outcome */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "model_used" TEXT /* Machine learning model used for prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_thread_id FOREIGN KEY ("thread_id") REFERENCES threads ("thread_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "thread_tags" (
  "thread_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the thread */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("thread_id", "tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_tags" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the post */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id", "tag_id")
)
